//: PM2 ecosystem recipe. Each app runs a verb on a cron schedule and exits
//2: (autorestart:false). Install with:  pm2 start pm2.example.json   then   pm2 save
//4: CONTENT_HOME is set in env here (the section 4.1 placement rule), NOT in
//5: $CONTENT_HOME/.env. The kickoff is the only app you need to start; the rest are
//6: OPTIONAL — start one only when you enable its pathway in config/system.json.

apps.//: OPTIONAL — intra-day calendar tick (config-gated: scheduler.tick_enabled; release-spec 8.4).
apps.//2: Clock-precise firing on top of the daily kickoff; run on a sub-daily cadence (e.g. every 15m).
apps.//3: Shares the kickoff dedup state + single-runner lock, so the same (date,slot) never doubles.
apps.name: content-engine-tick

apps.//: OPTIONAL — trend pass (config-gated: trends.enabled; release-spec 8.8). cron_restart
apps.//3: For the apify adapter, set the confirmed trends.tracked_accounts + trends.keywords in config.
apps.name: content-engine-trend-poll

apps.//: OPTIONAL — monthly competitor scan (config-gated: competitor_scan.enabled; roadmap #5).
apps.//2: One app per brand (set --brand). --yes confirms the DD-18 scrape gate. After each run,
apps.name: content-engine-competitor-scan

apps.//: OPTIONAL — monthly breakout-discovery reminder (free, manual Grok). Prints the prompt
apps.//2: (read-only, no spend) so the manual step never slips; see it in `pm2 logs`. Then run
apps.//3: `engine suggest apply --file <reply> --brand <brand-id> --yes` to APPEND confirmed items.
apps.name: content-engine-breakout-reminder
